_comment: Example showing a custom computed segment for encoding.
_comment2: Register your encoder in computed_registry.py, then reference it here.
_comment3: The builder loads sc.bin, runs it through your encoder function,
_comment4: and inserts the resulting bytes — all in pure Python, no subprocess.
